title: Modern 4BR in Tampines — Walk to Everything
raw_copy: Brand-new 4-bedroom unit in the fast-growing Tampines North estate. Just a 3 min walk to Tampines MRT — you'll be at work before your coffee cools. A quick 15 min drive takes you straight to Marina Bay Sands. Excellent amenities: wet markets, hawker centres, and at least 10 supermarkets within walking distance. Bordered by a lush park belt offering tranquil unobstructed park views from every window. Top-rated primary schools (including Poi Ching and St. Hilda's Primary) are right next door. Tampines Avenue 9 is a peaceful, quiet residential stretch — no traffic worries here. 1,389 sqft. S$1,450,000. Don't miss out on this rare gem.

claims.raw_text: 15 min drive to Marina Bay Sands
at least 10 supermarkets within walking distance
tranquil unobstructed park views from every window
Top-rated primary schools (including Poi Ching and St. Hilda's Primary) are right next door
Tampines Avenue 9 is a peaceful, quiet residential stretch
